title: SimplyVanilla
description: What if Mojang made Minecraft Java Edition simply "better?" Here is the answer to your question.
body:
_What started as a small project for friends quickly grew into something more – a passion project aimed at perfecting the vanilla experience. If you love this modpack, share it with your friends too (:_

![The SimplyVanilla title... that's really it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/824449ef66b0239e32c25c50c48f2e370cb051e1.png)
## Simply Enhanced; Purely Vanilla. As intended

### Tons of Features
SimplyVanilla has as many QoL features as you need, while still feeling like they should be in the vanilla game.
### HUGE Focus on immersion
With multiple mods, such as ambient sounds and subtle effects, it immerses you in the world you're playing on
### Client side
Even with the teeming amount of additions, you can still play on serves or with those that don't use SimplyVanilla **[LAN does break tho]**
### Semi-frequent updates
As a solo person in this project, I try to keep up to date with official game and mod updates.

<details>
<summary>Frequently Asked (noobie) Questions</summary>

- **Q:** **Where the heck is Iris Shaders?**
- **A:** Iris shaders (along with other mods) are **GONE**. SimplyVanilla aims to upgrade the vanilla graphics, and shaders breaks some mods/resource packs
-----
- **Q:** **How do I enable/disable mods?**
- **A:** If you're using the modrinth app, search for the project you're looking for, and toggle it on/off. There are guides for other launchers.
-----
- **Q:** **There's a bug on the loose/Something is broken**
- **A:** Currently, there is no way to report issues as of now :(
-----
- **Q:** **I like this modpack. What can I do to support you?**
- **A:** Don't support me, support the developers who sacrificed their time to make these great mods in this modpack. Although credit for if you mention it in a gameplay video would be apreciated for me :)
-----
- **Q:** **I want my mod/resource pack to be part of SimplyVanilla**
- **A:** I am actively looking for hidden gems with few downloads. If you have a project you would like to see added, contact me on Discord **(@DiskVreaker)**

</details>
